name: smothered_mate
headline: The Smothered Mate! 🎯
hook_text: White to move: Can you suffocate the Black King?
details: The Knight delivers checkmate while the King is surrounded by his own pieces. A classic pattern!

youtube_metadata.title: The Classic Smothered Mate! 🤯 #Shorts
youtube_metadata.description:
The Knight is the perfect tool for a smother. Watch how White forces the King into a corner and delivers the final blow.

Solution: 1. Qd5+ Kh8 2. Nf7#
